MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Scott A. Freedman, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: FATON BINAKU

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF FATON BINAKU's Motion to Compel Responses to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Demand for Production of Documents is GRANTED. No opposition has been filed. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $665 pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure Section 2023.030. Judge: Monica Wiley, not reported.
